calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for petitioner Troy McDaniel.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that she had prepared a supplemental declaration in response to the Examiner's Notes, showing the current balance in the estate of the sun of $437,612.94. She
stated that although the administrator had made made improper use of estate property without Court authorization, all beneficiaries had waived objections and desired approval of the final distribution. The Court raised the issue of improper inclusion of certain matters in the fees request. Ms. Hinshaw responded that she had accepted the Probate Examiners' notes regarding this and prepared a revised order which had been adjusted accordingly. The Court noted that he would have to review the amounts in the order. The Court granted the petition for final distribution and payment of fees (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)
